notable_session_artifacts.pre_push_hook: hooks/scripts/git/pre-push (activated via git config core.hooksPath hooks/scripts/git)

operational_notes: Pre-push hook is in effect on THIS repo (local git config). Other clones need `git config core.hooksPath hooks/scripts/git` to activate.
IDENTITY_VERSION is an internal migration trigger, decoupled from package.json. Bump IDENTITY_VERSION when IDENTITY_CHUNKS content changes. Bump package.json independently per release.

Hook-proxy.sh routes to newest-mtime per-pid socket. MCP processes that predate a fix won't serve the fixed behavior — user needs a fresh MCP spawn (close-and-reopen Claude Code session) for latest binary to take effect.
Claude Code --resume caches SessionStart hook additionalContext. Stale context in [IDENTITY] block does NOT mean migration failed — confirm via direct introspect or forced hook fire.
